program: TASK-181 (Glass Box program-of-record) — Wave 3, D4 additive library scale-up
objective: Wire the full 36-additive tiered library into the D4 detector and regenerate d4_additives in the pilot JSONs. Annotate-only, OFF byte-identical, no score/grade/gate/glassBox movement.

detector_lookup.note: 35 distinct table keys cover 36 library additives — E1412/E1414 (library #36) are FOLDED into the E1422 modified-starch key (same Hebrew term, same group ADI) per the tiered library instruction, not a separate key. All 36 additives are detectable.
detector_lookup.ev043_distribution: 19/7/5/3/1/0/1 (likely-neutral 7 counts E1422+E1412/E1414 as 2 library rows sharing 1 detector key)

engine_logic_change.digit_boundary_fix: E-number matcher now rejects a match immediately followed by another digit, so 'e141' no longer falsely matches inside 'e1412'/'e1414'/'e1442'. This precision fix was FORCED by the lookup extension (adding E141 alongside the E1412/E1414 fold created a substring collision that would emit a fabricated additive — a no-invent governance violation). Roman-numeral tails (E450iii) and letter suffixes (E472e) still match. No tier/scoring logic touched.
engine_logic_change.false_positives_removed: 2 maadanim products (pudding) declaring E1412/E1414 were wrongly emitting E141 copper-chlorophylls; now corrected. The 1 remaining E141 (מילקי טופ עדשים) is a TRUE positive — the label literally declares 'E-141' in its colour blend.

off_byte_identity.note: snack_bars + golden_milk are frozen no-change safeguards — 0 diffs confirms frozen invariants untouched.

engine_on_pilot_invariants.note: verify_glassbox_w2_off_identical.py on_pilot — score_changes=0, grade_changes=0 across all 4 corpora. Annotate-only confirmed at the engine level.

bread_frontend_v2.json.source: BSIP0 raw panel (17/24 have ingredient text), NOT the displayed-JSON ingredient field (181A scanned that and found 9/24). Display-wire only — no rescore, gate/score/grade/glassBox untouched.

vegspreads.note: subset of hummus corpus (matbucha/eggplant/pepper spread); 22 products, 21 with_d4 — verified, no separate JSON.

protected_field_assertion.method: field-by-field diff of each pilot JSON vs git HEAD

missing_explanation_he.graceful_render: AdditivePanel.tsx line 146 crash-guards explanation_he with `?? ''` — empty Line 2 renders blank, no broken UI. function_he (always engine-populated) still shows on the 'עוד' expand. Tier chip always renders.
missing_explanation_he.content_priority_note: 12 of 14 are tier=functional (the calmest tier). The 2 higher-priority copy targets carry more weight on the panel chip: E960 steviol (dose-dependent) and E141 copper chlorophylls (unclassified).

guardrails.frozen_invariants_untouched: milk run_005_headpin / snack 70/B / bread provenance — confirmed (snack_bars + golden_milk 0-diff; bread display-wire only, no rescore)

recommendation: Open Content task 181E to author explanation_he for the 14 displayed-shelf additives above (prioritize E960 + E141). No-invent governance: Data did NOT fabricate copy.
proposed_status: RETURNED (for CC close-readiness gate; Data does not write CLOSED)
